com.pax.poslink

Class BatchRequest

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.base.BaseRequest<BatchRequest>
      • com.pax.poslink.BatchRequest
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable

    public class BatchRequest
extends BaseRequest<BatchRequest>
    To set batch transaction request properties
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

    • Field Detail

      • TransType

        public int TransType
        Indicate the transaction type.

        BATCHCLOSE = 1 - used to close the current batch
        FORCEBATCHCLOSE = 2 - used to force close the current batch, if host supports it.
        BATCHCLEAR = 3 - used to clear local database
        PURGEBATCH = 4 - used to purge batch
        SAFUPLOAD = 5 - This command is used to launch store and forward (SAF) transactions uploading, if supported by host.
        DELETESAFFILE = 6 - This command uses the delete store and forward (SAF) records once upload success or failed.
        DELETETRANSACTION = 7 - This command is used to delete a transaction log from database.
        An Error will be returned while invoking POSLink.ProcessTrans if user set other value.
        User can assign the TransType by com.PAX.POSLink.BatchRequest.ParseTransType or assign an integer directly.
        Example:
        BatchRequest batch = new BatchRequest();
        batch.TransType = batch.ParseTransType("BATCHCLOSE"); //recommend
        or
        batch.TransType = 1;

      • EDCType

        public int EDCType
        Indicate the EDC type.

        ALL = 0
        CREDIT = 1
        DEBIT = 2
        CHECK = 3
        EBT = 4
        GIFT = 5
        LOYALTY = 6
        CASH = 7
        Only above value accepted, other value will be omitted.
        User can assign the EDCType by com.PAX.POSLink.BatchRequest.ParseEDCType or assign an integer directly.
        Example: BatchRequest batch = new BatchRequest();
        batch.EDCType = batch.ParseEDCType("CREDIT"); //recommend
        or
        batch.EDCType = 1;

      • Timestamp

        public java.lang.String Timestamp
        Time/date stamp of transaction.

        Attribute: n14

        The date time, YYYYMMDDhhmmss

      • SAFIndicator

        public java.lang.String SAFIndicator
        Store and forward upload type indicator

        Attribute: n1

        0: New stored transactions. 1: Failed transactions 2: All (upload/resend Failed + New records)

        Only valid by SAFUPLOAD and DELETESAFFILETransType

      • CardType

        public int CardType
        Indicate the Card type.

        Attribute: n2

        VISA = 1
        MASTERCARD = 2
        AMEX = 3
        DISCOVER = 4
        DINERCLUB = 5
        ENROUTE = 6
        JCB = 7
        REVOLUTIONCARD = 8
        OTHER = 9
        Only above value accepted, other value will be omitted.
        Used only TransType is LOCALDETAILREPORT/ LOCALTOTALREPORT
        User can assign the CardType by com.PAX.POSLink.ReportRequest.ParseCardType or assign an integer directly.
        Example: BatchRequest batch = new BatchRequest();
        batch.CardType = report.ParseCardType("MASTERCARD"); //recommend
        or
        batch.CardType = 2;

        Only valid when TransType =DELETETRANSACTION

      • PaymentType

        public int PaymentType
        Indicate the payment type.

        Attribute: n..2

        See PaymentTransType for definition. User can assign the PaymentType by ParsePaymentType(String) or assign an integer directly.
        Example:
        BatchRequest batch = new BatchRequest();
        batch.PaymentType = batch.ParseTransType("ADJUST"); //recommend
        or
        batch.PaymentType = 10;

        Only valid when TransType =DELETETRANSACTION

      • RecordNum

        public java.lang.String RecordNum
        The log index in terminal.

        Attribute: n..4

        Only valid when TransType =DELETETRANSACTION

      • RefNum

        public java.lang.String RefNum
        Terminal reference number used for follow-up transactions.

        Attribute: n..4

        Only valid when TransType =DELETETRANSACTION

      • AuthCode

        public java.lang.String AuthCode
        Retrieve the transaction record with the matching authorization number.

        Attribute: ans..10

        Only valid when TransType =DELETETRANSACTION

      • ECRRefNum

        public java.lang.String ECRRefNum
        Retrieve a transaction record with the merchant reference number.

        Attribute: ans..16

        Only valid when TransType =DELETETRANSACTION

      • MultiMerchant

        public MultiMerchant MultiMerchant
        MultiMerchant Information. see MultiMerchant for detail.

        Only valid when TransType =BATCHCLOSE

        Since:
        V1.04.00

      • ExtData

        public java.lang.String ExtData

        Extended data in XML format

        Name FormatDescription
        <MM_ID> n..2

        Used to indicate the specific merchant id, valid between [0, 24].

        Valid when TransType = BATCHCLOSE. And only apply for Multi-Merchant application.
        <MM_Name> ans..6

        Used indicate the specific merchant name.

        Valid when TransType = BATCHCLOSE. And only apply for Multi-Merchant application.

    • Constructor Detail

      • BatchRequest

        public BatchRequest()

    • Method Detail

      • ParseTransType

        public int ParseTransType(java.lang.String type)
        parse the String transaction type to integer type.
        Parameters:
        type - could be "BATCHCLOSE","FORCEBATCHCLOSE","BATCHCLEAR", "PURGEBATCH"
        Returns:
        an integer identify the TransType, or -1 if parse error.

      • ParseEDCType

        public int ParseEDCType(java.lang.String type)
        parse the String EDC type to integer type.
        Parameters:
        type - could be "ALL","CREDIT","DEBIT","CHECK","EBT","GIFT","LOYALTY","CASH"
        Returns:
        an integer identify the EDC Type, or -1 if parse error.

      • ParseCardType

        public int ParseCardType(java.lang.String type)
        parse the String Card type to integer type.
        Parameters:
        type - could be "VISA","MASTERCARD","AMEX","DISCOVER","DINERCLUB","ENROUTE","JCB","REVOLUTIONCARD","OTHER"
        Returns:
        an integer identify the Card Type, or -1 if parse error.

      • ParsePaymentType

        public int ParsePaymentType(java.lang.String type)
        parse the String transaction type to integer type.
        Parameters:
        type - Same as PaymentRequest.ParseTransType(String)
        Returns:
        an integer identify the transaction Type, or -1 if parse error.

      • pack

        protected BatchRequest pack()
        Specified by:
        pack in class BaseRequest<BatchRequest>
